    @allure.story("删除布局成功")
    # @pytest.mark.run(order=1)
    def test_production_delsuccess(self, login_to_production):
        driver = login_to_production  # WebDriver 实例
        production = ProductionPage(driver)  # 用 driver 初始化 ProductionPage
        layout = "测试布局A"
